title: Valley Station, KY
description: <CENTRE> <SIZE:medium> VALLEY STATION <LINE> <LINE><LEFT> <SIZE:small> Though only a short drive from Louisville along the Dixie Highway, Valley Station is rural life at its most relaxing. Spend a day watching the Ohio flow past. Go birdwatching, walking, or hunting in Jefferson Forest. <LINE> <LINE> When you're ready to return to civilization, visit Crossroads Mall for just about anything you can think of!
